scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n shell,auth,tasks,analytics -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm --filter shell-app dev" "pnpm --filter auth-front dev:preview" "pnpm --filter task-front dev:preview" "pnpm --filter analytics-front dev:preview"
scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter auth-front build && pnpm --filter task-front build && pnpm --filter analytics-front build && pnpm --filter shell-app build
